case_title: BRADLEY NOVAK VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; MOTION SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE RETALIATION CAUSE OF ACTION IS DENIED; MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON THE DEFAMATION CAUSE OF ACTION IS GRANTED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, or objection, the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative Summary Adjudication, is adopted as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for summary judgment is denied. The City's motion for summary adjudication on the retaliation cause of action is denied and its motion for summary adjudication on the defamation cause of action is granted.

[See word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.}

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Set For Trial On Feb-18-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
